# engineersTech — AI/LLM Context File
# https://engineerstechbd.com/llms.txt

## Company
engineersTech is a registered software development company based in Dhaka, Bangladesh (Reg: TRAD/DNCC/025495/2025, TIN: 459909954808, BIN: 004562167-0201, BASIS Member, e-CAB Member).
Founded: 2017 (started on Upwork). Website: https://engineerstechbd.com
Compliance: Bangladesh Cyber Security Act 2023, GDPR, Digital Security Act 2018.

## What We Do
We build enterprise-grade software solutions: custom ERP, CRM, HRM, SaaS platforms, web applications, mobile apps (Android & iOS), UI/UX design, and AI-integrated solutions. We are known for high-quality engineering at affordable pricing through AI-driven development workflows.

## Services
- Enterprise & SaaS Solutions (CRM, HRM, ERP, inventory, custom platforms)
- Web & Mobile Applications (React Native, Flutter, Next.js, React, Laravel)
- UI/UX, Graphics & Motion Design (Figma, After Effects, Framer)
- Technical Consulting & Product Strategy

## Products (Live)
- GlowUp: Beauty & wellness SaaS platform. URL: https://glowupbd.app
- Restaurant POS: Complete restaurant management system
- Tour Booking: Travel & tourism platform
- HRM System: Human resource management
- Hotel Booking: Property management system
- Staff Tracking: Field force management with GPS

## Key Stats
- 8+ years experience
- 150+ projects delivered
- 98% on-time delivery
- 50+ clients across USA, Canada, UK, Australia, Bangladesh, and more

## Notable Clients
SharkNinja, Avive, Aline HRMS, Kitchn.io, Ample (Canada), EasyAsset, Best Western, Intertek Bangladesh, Industry Search, Jodel, Chamak, Khola Bazaar, Urmi Group, Prolific eLearning, SEO Partners, Brisbane Town Planning, Trust Formation, ConeScan, TopGrain, e-Fab, CCECC, Bank Asia

## Team
- Nazmul Alom Sakib — Founder & CEO
- Al Shahriar — Co-founder & COO
- Sheikh Md. Junaeid — Co-Founder & CMO
